title: tamak #8551
definition:
1) to grasp, hold, support, attain, lay hold of, hold fast
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to grasp, lay hold of, attain
        1a2) to hold up, support
        1a3) to hold, keep
        1a4) to take hold of each other
    1b) (Niphal) to be seized, be held
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to grasp, support, attain
